title: Katakuri Forces Luffy Past His Limit
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Big Mom as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama, is that you?! She looks like a completely different person...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may have to ditch this ship if it comes to that!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 13 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
